flashcards.definition: Magnitude 9.1 off Japan; triggered a devastating tsunami and the Fukushima nuclear disaster; ~20,000 deaths.
Magnitude 7.0; catastrophic due to poor infrastructure and poverty; ~200,000+ deaths; highlighted preparedness gaps.
Lateral blast eruption in Washington state; 57 deaths; major case study in volcanic monitoring and ecosystem recovery.
Network of ocean buoys and seismic stations that detect tsunamis and alert coastal populations to evacuate.
Planning, infrastructure investment, building codes, early warning systems, and education that reduce natural hazard casualties.
